info.title: Google Calendar
info.description: Manipulates events and other calendar data.

get.summary: Returns an event based on its Google Calendar ID.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier. To retrieve calendar IDs call the calendarList.list method. If you want to access the primary calendar of the currently logged in user, use the "primary" keyword.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Event identifier.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: Time zone used in the response. Optional. The default is the time zone of the calendar.

parameters.name: maxAttendees
parameters.description: The maximum number of attendees to include in the response.

get.summary: Returns events on the specified calendar.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

parameters.name: timeMin
parameters.description: Lower bound (exclusive) for an event's end time to filter by. RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: timeMax
parameters.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for an event's start time to filter by. RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of events returned on one result page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token specifying which result page to return.

parameters.name: singleEvents
parameters.description: Whether to expand recurring events into instances and only return single one-off events and instances of recurring events, but not the underlying recurring events themselves.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: The order of the events returned in the result.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

parameters.name: sendUpdates
parameters.description: Whether to send notifications about the creation of the new event.

parameters.name: conferenceDataVersion
parameters.description: Version number of conference data supported by the API client.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

get.summary: Returns the calendars on the user's calendar list.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries returned on one result page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token specifying which result page to return.

parameters.name: showHidden
parameters.description: Whether to show hidden entries.

post.summary: Creates an event based on a simple text string.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text describing the event to be created.

post.summary: Returns free/busy information for a set of calendars.
Watch for changes to Events resources.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

get.summary: Returns the rules in the access control list for the calendar.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Calendar identifier.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries returned on one result page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token specifying which result page to return.

post.summary: Stop watching resources through this channel.
